memoryArtifacts.description: Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Fowler, Fouler, Fowlers, Fouler, Fowlar, Folar, Fouller, Fowlare, Foweller, Fowaller, Foulier, Foullar, Foular and many more. First found in Norfolk where they were seated from very ancient times, some say well before the Norman Conquest and the arrival of Duke William at Hastings in 1066 C.E. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: John Fowler who settled in Virginia in 1622; just two years after the arrival of the "Mayflower." He was followed soon after by settlers of the name in Barbados, Massachusetts, Maryland, and Rhode Island. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009). Motto Translated: He is wise who watches. This interesting surname is of Anglo-Saxon origin, and is from an occupational name for a bird-catcher or hunter of wild birds. In the medieval period a fowler would have been an important position, and all major houses would have employed one. The derivation is from the Old English pre-7th Century "fugelere", hunter of wild birds. Job-descriptive surnames originally denoted the actual occupation of the name bearer, and later became hereditary. There are several name bearers listed in the "Dictionary of National Biography", many being men of the church, the others tending towards innovation, such as John Fowler (1826 - 1864), who invented the steam plow, in 1858 he received a prize from the Royal Agricultural Society for his steam cultivator, and William Fowler (1761 - 1832), an artist, who was said to have introduced lead lines in representing colored glass. The name reached the New World in the early 17th Century, when it is recorded that one George Fowler, aged 22 yrs., sailed aboard the "Primrose" in July 1635, bound for Virginia. The first recorded spelling of the family name is shown to be that of Richard Fugelere, which was dated 1218, witness in the "Assize Court Rolls of Lancashire", during the reign of King Henry 2nd, known as "The Frenchman", 1216 - 1272. Surnames became necessary when governments introduced personal taxation. In England this was known as Poll Tax. Throughout the centuries, surnames in every country have continued to "develop" often leading to astonishing variants of the original spelling.  Copyright: Name Origin Research www.surnamedb.com 1980 - 2014.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Fowler於大約1480年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Sir William Fowler36歲，母親Margaret Colwick22歲。他於1519年與Johanna Harman在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾比士利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Fowler于大约1480年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Sir William Fowler36岁，母亲Margaret Colwick22岁。他于1519年与Johanna Harman在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾比士利。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Fowler was born about 1480, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir William Fowler, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Colwick, was 22. He married Johanna Harman in 1519, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He was buried in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Fowler est né environ 1480, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Fowler, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Colwick, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Harman en 1519, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Ilenterré à Bisley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Fowler um 1480 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Fowler 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Colwick 22. Er hat 1519 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Johanna Harman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er wurde in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Fowler è nato il circa 1480 nel Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Fowler, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Colwick, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Harman nel 1519, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Fu sepolto a Bisley, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Fowlerが約1480年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Fowlerは36歳，母Margaret Colwickは22歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでJohanna Harmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアビスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Fowler(이)가 대략 1480년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Fowler(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Colwick(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Johanna Harman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 그루스스터실르 비슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Fowler nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Fowler, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Colwick, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Harman em 1519, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Fowler родился около 1480 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Fowler было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Colwick, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Harman в 1519 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности бисли, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Fowler nació aproximadamente 1480, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Fowler, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Colwick, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Johanna Harman en 1519, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Fue sepultado en Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
